messages.message: I plan to move my army from VEN to TUS to strengthen my southern flank. If you're looking to push into Germany or Austria, we could coordinate efforts. Let me know your intentions.

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!
I have no interest in conflict with you at this time. If you're planning to move into Galicia or Budapest, I will not interfere with your eastern front.

Hi France,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?
Hello Germany! I am keen to maintain good relations between us. Let me know if I can help in any way

Hey Russia!
So I'm a fan of a good ol' fashioned Juggernaut, let me know if you're down for a bit of a mutual standoff in BLA to start off with and we can coordinate from there.
Agreed! I think a DMZ in Bohemia and Tyrolia is in our best interests.
Hi England! What are your thoughts on France? I would be open to some sort of arrangement if you are interested.
Hi Italy! Just wanted to reach out and get things going. What are your thoughts on Austria? I am hoping we can keep the central powers operating in peace together.
Hi Turkey, just wanted to touch base and start things off with you!

Hey Turkey! I also like a juggernaut but the mutual standoff in BLA in Spring 1901 I think is probably the best way to convince the rest of the board that we aren't really going for one. Does that work for you? I find that as Turkey, the first thing I have to do when I can is disguise our relationship as much as possible
Hey Italy! What do you think about Dmzing Piedmont, Gol and W Med? I don't want to spread myself thin attacking Germany or Austria in the early game.
Either way, let me know how I can help you.

I aim to secure Tuscany and the Ionian Sea. If you're looking to expand northward, we might find ways to avoid clashing. Open to discussion.

I am trying to get a feel for who Russia might be in the west, so I might not need your help in the east, but I appreciate the offer!
Hello Italy! I'm very much of the opinion that Russia and Italy are natural allies and that one of the best ways to continue to benefit each other is to contain Austria and Turkey. What do you think?
Hi Germany! What do you have in mind?

I'm open to supporting Gol and W Med if it helps our mutual interests. However, I suggest we focus on stabilizing our own flanks first. I’ll hold my army in VEN for now unless we coordinate further.
